user.title: QR Code RTSP Reader
user.description: Point this at a camera RTSP stream (preferably a low-resolution substream).

error.invalid_url: URL must start with rtsp://, rtsps://, http:// or https://

add_rule.title: Add a QR access rule
add_rule.description: Bind a QR payload to a validity window. Leave a field empty to leave it unrestricted.

data.payload: QR payload (exact text in the code)
data.title: Title (what this code is for)
data.name: Name (short identifier, embedded in the code)
data.script_entity: Script to run on an authorized scan

edit_rule.title: Edit rule
edit_rule.description: Change the rule, or tick Delete to remove it. Leave a field empty to leave it unrestricted.
